source_pr.title: plan: make sort's cost right
source_pr.body:
sort's cost may be less than 0 when the count is less than 1. We should avoid this.
@winoros @lamxTyler PTAL

symptoms: sql: "select c from t where t.c = 1 and t.d = 1 order by t.a limit 1", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select c from t where t.c = 1 and t.d = 1 order by t.a limit 1", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select c from t where t.c = 1 and t.d = 1 order by t.a limit 1", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
